abilities: Sometimes you gotta light your own fuse.
I can always count on you, Bob.
Bob, I have HAD IT with you!
chatter: I'm the last one you'll ever cross.
Been a while.
Better get paid after all this. I don't like havin' my time wasted.
Follow the rules, and we won't have a problem.
I'm in charge. Don't forget that.
Let's get this show on the road.
Saddle up. We got work to do.
We're doin' this my way.
We're playin' by my rules.
Look at all these good Samaritans. What are we doin' here, Bob? (if multiple good-natured heroes are on the team)
This is a hardy bunch of outlaws. Just need somethin' to steal. (if multiple law-breaking/wanted heroes are on the team)
I'm dyin' to see how you botch this one, Cassidy. (if Cassidy is on the team)
Aww, hell. The law's here. (if Pharah is on the team)
Giddyup!
Time to get this rollin'!
Let's make a scene.
Let's ride!
Wanna make it out of this? Do what I say.
All accordin' to plan.
I think this is goin' well.
Not bad at all. Keep it up.
We have a good thing goin'. Let's not mess it up.
It's not time to throw in the towel yet.
No hittin' the sack. We ain't done here.
Still too early to call it quits.
I think we're just about done here.
Keep your eyes on the prize!
Stay focused, and let's bring home the bacon.
Time to put our heads down and end this properly.
Back from the bone orchard.
I ain't a quitter.
I am not ready to ride into the sunset.
I don't take kindly to bein' knocked down.
I know one thing: someone's gonna pay.
I'm about to pitch a fit!
Let's get back in the saddle.
Now to show 'em that I mean business.
This town just ain't big enough.
You won't get the best of me.
I hate to be interrupted. (eliminated with Kill Streak)
Let's work together this time?
Where is everybody?
Where's my backup?
Whew! Much better.
Patched up.
That's better.
Can't handle the heat? Stay out of my way.
I'm on fire!
My coals are red hot!
My fuse is lit!
Not bad.
That'll do nicely.
Well, well.
Won't look a gift horse in the mouth.
Ah... That's what I like to see.
Is that a present for me?
Kick the molasses out of 'em!
That's a fine payout.
I needed that.
*sighs* Just what I needed.
Thank you.
I get the idea.
Just point me in the right direction.
Let me handle it.
Damn!
Oh, come on!
Hallelujah!
I owe you one.
Don't know when to quit, do they?
*sigh* They just don't stay down.
call-outs: They want a fight, huh? Let's give it to 'em!
Enemy sniper! Get your head down!
Enemy sniper! Keep your eyes open!
Come out where I can see you!
We need to take out that turret.
You should be quakin' in your boots!
Hold out for a spell, and this fight's ours.
Stand your ground... This one's ours.
Stick it out and we take this home!
Clock's tickin'. Get the lead out!
I ain't a quitter. Get in there!
Quit dawdlin' and get a move-on!
eliminations: I stick up for my crew.
You need to learn the rules.
Easy, girl scout. (eliminating Brigitte or Pharah )
Now who's the better shot? (eliminating Cassidy )
We said "Deadlock for life", I meant it! (eliminating Cassidy )
This ain't a debutante ball. (eliminating Domina )
Never should have let you get away... (eliminating Echo )
Ahh, brought a knife to a gun fight... (eliminating Genji )
I'm the queen 'round these parts. (eliminating Junker Queen )
What was that about "biting back", now? (eliminating Kiriko )
Don't care how many hearts you got. What you need is brains. (eliminating Mauga )
Huh! Two hearts and no brains. (eliminating Mauga )
Hell doesn't freeze over that easily. (eliminating Mei )
Keep your brainwashin' mitts of B.O.B.! (eliminating Ramattra )
Angela's singin' with the angels now... (eliminating Mercy )
Solved our little rat problem. (eliminating Wrecking Ball )
Arbalest rifles: acc-u-rate at range. (long-range final blow)
I can shoot the spines off a cactus a mile away. (long-range final blow)
That shot would make Bars proud. (long-range final blow)
Not a raincloud in sight. (eliminating airborne enemy)
Bob, did you see that?! Can you believe it? (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Damn! Some days I impress myself. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Read you like the mornin' paper. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Get back in that grave! (eliminating recently resurrected enemy)
Think I'm scared of you just 'cause you're glowing? (eliminating Nano-Boosted enemy)
Read you like a book, Cole. (eliminating Cassidy using Deadeye)
Thanks for standin' still, Cole. (eliminating Cassidy using Deadeye)
Well, would you look at the time? (eliminating Cassidy using Deadeye)
Bad ninja! Down. (eliminating Genji using Dragonblade)
You're not nabbin' 'em away from me! (eliminating enemy being Life Gripped by Lifeweaver )
No rainin' over my desert! (eliminating Pharah using Barrage)
Oh, not the giant wall... I hate this thing. (eliminating Symmetra using Photon Barrier)
Too bad you can't be angry and smart at the same time. (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
Ha ha ha... Better get diggin', Bob!
You can all just take it easy.
Don't all volunteer at once, now!
They don't call me an outlaw for nothin'.
Not my first rodeo. Certainly not my last.
Best not leave this debt unpaid.
I know you'll pay me back.
I know you're good for it.
Hands off my merchandise. (saving Echo from enemy Cassidy )
I'm not afraid to get my hands dirty.
Ugh, get out of my way.
That's what a broken nose feels like. (eliminating Cassidy )
Big guy, glass jaw. Never fails. (eliminating Mauga )
Flying fistfights? What kind of battle is this? (eliminating airborne enemy)
I'm at the top of my game. You're headed to the bottom.
Can't abide a show-off. (eliminating enemy using ultimate ability)
Oh, hush. (eliminating enemy using ultimate ability)
Can't put a price on good help.
Decided to make yourself useful? (to Cassidy )
Didn't think you had the stomach for it. (to Mercy )
interactions: Ashe : They say you're a good shot. Hope you don't mind that I'm better. Ana : I know more than anyone that a head that big is an easy target.
Ashe : Why the hell'd you give B.O.B. all that firepower?! Ana : He doesn't waste it.
Ana : He does good work, doesn't he? Ashe : That he does.
Ashe : A wanted man on the run. I've known a few of you. Baptiste : I'm only guilty of stealing hearts. Ashe : *chuckle* Guess it's a good thing I'm heart less .
Brigitte : Real glory comes from helping people, not hurting them. Ashe : We may have... different definitions.
Cassidy : How's Bars doin'? Surprised she didn't take my head off last time I stopped by. Ashe : She's not goin' to miss if you come 'round again.
Ashe : I'll only ask one more time, Cassidy. Where'd you leave my bike? Cassidy : Not sure you wanna know. Ashe : If I find even a scratch on it, Bob is gonna use you for target practice!
Cassidy : Wouldn't exactly say it's nice to see you again. Ashe : Bite me. Cassidy : I'd rather bite the dust. Ashe : Good. I'll kick some up for you.

Ashe : Stone Anthony says you still owe him five hundred dollars for that weekend in Tucson. Cassidy : He's welcome to come collect. Ashe : Seems to think you're going to shoot him dead if he does. Cassidy : Must not want it that bad, then.
Ashe : Good thing your brains aren't made of dynamite. Cassidy : Yeah? Why's that? Ashe : Wouldn't be enough up there to blow your nose. Cassidy : You seem a little stuffy yourself.

Cassidy : I'm feelin' generous today, Ashe. Think I might just remember where I left your bike after all. Ashe : I don't want it. Cassidy : Whut? I thought you loved that bike! You bluffin', Ashe? Ashe : I never bluff. You ought to know that by now.

Cassidy : Heard the news about Frankle. She 'n bez finally got hitched? Ashe : Hm. Cassidy : Glad to hear they're gettin' on well. That goes for all of you. Ashe : And we're all tickled pink to hear it.

D.Va: I saw you on a wanted poster with a cute guy! Ashe: *sigh* Tell me you don't mean Cassidy . D.Va: Ew, no! The tall one with the little hat! Ashe: Oh, Bob? *chuckle* I'll tell him you said hello.
Ashe : Your parents ever pester you about goin' back to the family business? Doomfist : They are supportive of my work, now that they have seen what I've become. Ashe : How sweet of them.

Ashe : I can't believe we lost such valuable cargo. You would've fetched a fine sum. Echo : My condolences for your loss. Ashe : Considering that you have to deal with Cole, I'd say it's really your loss.
Echo : You know, I saved Cole's life once. Ashe : Am I supposed to be thankful for that?
Ashe: From what I can tell, you and I are simpático on how we like things run. Hanzo: For your sake, I hope not.
Ashe : You headed home after this, Haz? Hazard : Aye. Thought I'd bring Susie by the memorial. Ashe : You're more sentimental than I thought. Hazard : Aren't all us criminals softer than we say so?
Hazard : Lovin' the bleached look. You do that yourself? Ashe : Sweet of you to say so darlin', but it's natural. Hazard : Right, well... looks class!
Hazard : Braw! Glad you two are on my team. Ashe : *chuckle* Likewise.
Hazard : Oi! I had them pinned! Ashe : Bob's not passin' up an easy target, Haz.

Ashe : That is a mighty fine rifle. Mind if I give it a whirl? Illari : You don't seem like the type to give it back. Ashe : * gasp * Come on now... I'm a woman of my word. Illari : Your actions speak louder.
Ashe : *whistling* They make 'em all as big as you where you come from? Junker Queen : Nah. I was a special order.
Junkrat: One stick o' dynamite? Well, that's just adorable. Ashe: B.O.B ! Junkrat: I meant admirable! Admirable!

Juno : I reckon' we're gonna tan their hides, pardner! Ashe : I beg your pardon? Juno : You look like you are from the Westerns my father brought to Mars. Let's draw, gunslinger! Ashe : *chuckle* Oh, you got a lot to learn, cowgirl.
Ashe : We hunt foxes where I come from. Kiriko : Hm. Where I'm from, the foxes fight back.

Ashe : I hear, if it weren't for your parents, you'd be as much an outlaw as me. Lifeweaver : They're always trying to help, but frankly, I'd prefer they gave up. Ashe : Yeah? Well, be careful what you wish for.

Lifeweaver : I saw your parents at a few exorbitant parties when I was younger. Never you. Ashe : They didn't care to bring me along. Lifeweaver : A shame. I'm sure two wayward heirs could've got into loads of trouble. Ashe : *quiet chuckle* There's still plenty of time for that.

Ashe : How you making a living without the family fortune? Lifeweaver : Nothing so glamorous as running a gang outlaws, I'm afraid. Ashe : Well, Deadlock Gang would look mighty fine with a rose garden. Lifeweaver : Tempting. But I really should save the world first.

Ashe: Do my eyes deceive me, or are you wearin' skates? Nice skates. Very cute. You goin' to swap those out before we get to the gunfight? Y'all, our teammate is wearin' skates. To a gunfight! Hahaha! Lúcio: You'll see what these can do!
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Ashe : I'm partial to scorpions. Lúcio : Uh... yeah. I can see it.
Mauga : Wanna see me throw B.O.B. like a basketball? Ashe : Hands off! He ain't your toy. Mauga : ...Yet.
Ashe : I hear the fishing's great where you're from. Mauga : Our fish might be a little big for you. Ashe : There's nothing I can't catch with determination and a little dynamite.
Moira : Aggression is no substitute for ability. Ashe : Reckon that's true. Good thing I have both.
Ashe : I better not see your face in my neck of the woods. Ramattra : Are you afraid I'll free your servant? Ashe : Lay one finger on Bob and I'll show you what fear means.
Ashe : Can't imagine what kind of bounty they'd put on your head. Ramattra : I'm afraid I don't pay much attention to humanity's laws. Ashe : Look at that. We've got something in common.
Reinhardt : Stay behind me! I will keep you safe! Ashe : Thanks, but I already have a bodyguard.
Ashe : That's a lot of armor. Though I guess you are a pretty big target. Reinhardt : Aha! I guess I am!

Sojourn : You're too good with that gun to waste it on a life of crime. Ashe : I'll go on the straight and narrow when hell freezes over. Sojourn : Or when the law catches up with you. Ashe : *chuckle* Same thing.
Soldier: 76 : I was just in the kitchen. Anyone have something they wanna confess? Ashe : I ain't a snitch, but let's just say those corndogs are gone for good. Soldier: 76 : * tired sigh *

Ashe: You still have any contacts with Los Muertos ? Sombra: I might. What's in it for me? Ashe: I'd offer you money, but I don't think that's what you're after. Sombra: No. So... Any good stories about the cowboy ?
Ashe : Your company likes makin' headlines. Symmetra : Yes. A natural byproduct of repairing a chaotic world. Ashe : Hmpfh, seems more like a tactic to line their pockets... but what do I know?
Ashe : You need a dose of reality, little miss sunshine. Tracer : It doesn't hurt to look on the bright side. Ashe : Till the sun gets in your eyes.

Venture : Hey, what's the name of that omnic who's always with you? Ashe : Oh, that big hunk of metal? Name's B.O.B. Venture : Huh! How good is he at carrying priceless artifacts? Ashe : The very best. But I'm afraid he's spoken for.
Ashe: Time to settle who's the best shot. Widowmaker: There is no competition. I was trained by the best. Ashe: And I was trained by the west. Widowmaker: *sigh* Americans .
Ashe: That rifle is a fine piece of work. Looks a little unwieldy, though. Widowmaker : Perhaps, in the hands of an amateur.
Winston : Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Ashe : Can't say I do.
Ashe: Can you build me a bike? Money's no object. Wrecking Ball: He is an artist, not a mechanic. Ashe: All right. How about a new chassis for Bob? Wrecking Ball: That is... intriguing.
map-specific: I hear you can smuggle just about anythin' through those skyways.
Get a point on the board Bob!
I wouldn't mind stealin' a spaceship. You hear what they make satellites out of these days?
This place just ain't the same since that son of a gun ran away with my bike.
